page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7ix.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture bare-metal server instance designed for GPU-accelerated workloads. It features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors operating at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz. The system is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary accelerator hardware consists of eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 192 GB of VRAM. This dense GPU configuration is paired with a high-speed network interface providing a baseline bandwidth of 160 Gbps. However, the instance does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through attached network block storage.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.ebmgn7ix.32xlarge offers a highly consolidated hardware profile, packing eight enterprise GPUs and 128 dedicated physical cores into a single bare-metal node. This high resource density reduces the overhead associated with multi-node cluster management for medium-to-large scale workloads. The absence of local storage represents a clear architectural tradeoff, shifting the storage performance and cost considerations entirely to network-attached storage volumes.

This server type is engineered for workloads requiring massive parallel processing capabilities and high network throughput. Appropriate use cases include deep learning training, multi-stream video transcoding, high-concurrency AI inference, and complex graphics rendering pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7ix.32xlarge is an x86_64 bare-metal server optimized for GPU-accelerated computing. It is equipped with 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.9 GHz, alongside 512.0 GB of system memory. The instance features eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs with a combined 192 GB of VRAM, supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 160 Gbps. A key architectural tradeoff is the complete absence of local storage, requiring reliance on network-attached storage. This high-density hardware configuration delivers significant qualitative cost efficiency by consolidating massive compute and parallel processing capabilities into a single node, minimizing cluster management overhead. The server is designed for demanding workloads such as deep learning training, high-concurrency AI inference, video transcoding, and large-scale graphics rendering.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7ix.32xlarge is a bare-metal server featuring 128 Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, eight NVIDIA A10 GPUs with 192 GB VRAM, and 160 Gbps network bandwidth for GPU-accelerated workloads.

tagline: A high-density bare-metal platform featuring eight enterprise GPUs and dedicated Intel processors for intensive parallel computing workloads.

128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.9 GHz
512 GB of system memory and 160 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
